basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.job_location: IIT Goa Campus, Farmagudi, Ponda, Goa
basic_details.short_information: IIT Goa is recruiting a skilled Lab Assistant to support laboratory activities in the Electrical Engineering department on a temporary contract basis.

qualification.details: Candidates must possess the minimum educational qualification with consistent academic record and relevant experience. Preference will be given to candidates with practical laboratory experience in electrical engineering.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications: 3-year Diploma in Electrical Engg. + 1 year exp. OR ITI in Electrical + 3 years exp. OR Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engg.
vacancy_details.Desirable Qualifications: Good communication skills, enthusiasm to learn new tools & technologies, experience in relevant field

post_wise_breakdown.essential_qualifications: 3-year Diploma in Electrical Engg. + 1 year exp. OR ITI in Electrical + 3 years exp. OR Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engg.
post_wise_breakdown.desirable_qualifications: Good communication skills, enthusiasm to learn new tools & technologies, experience in relevant field

salary_details.details: Consolidated Salary: ₹21,000/- per month (Basic ₹18,000/- + Other Compensatory Allowance ₹3,000/-). Higher pay may be considered based on experience. Not entitled to Dearness Allowance (DA). Medical benefits and leave entitlements as per Institute norms.

selection_process: Selection will be through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must bring updated CV
and self-attested photocopies. Final selection is subject to performance in the interview and verification of documents.
how_to_apply: No separate application form is required for registration.
Report directly for the Walk-in Interview on 31-07-2026 at 09:30 AM.
Bring all original educational & experience certificates along with a set of self-attested photocopies and updated CV.
Venue: Indian Institute of Technology Goa, Admin Block, At Goa College of Engineering Campus, Farmagudi, Ponda-403401, Goa.
important_instructions: The engagement is purely on contract basis and will not confer any right for regular appointment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to disengage the candidate at any time. Candidates are advised to visit the IIT Goa website for any updates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Goa has released notification (No. IITGoa/RECT/NT-CON/2026-06) for engagement of Lab Assistant in Electrical Engineering on contract basis. The notification covers essential qualifications, desirable skills, remuneration, and walk-in interview details. Download IIT Goa Lab Assistant Recruitment Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Goa is recruiting a skilled Lab Assistant to support laboratory activities in the Electrical Engineering department on a temporary contract basis.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_iit_goa: IIT Goa Campus, Farmagudi, Ponda, Goa

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.essential_qualifications: 3-year Diploma in Electrical Engg. + 1 year exp. OR ITI in Electrical + 3 years exp. OR Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engg.
rows.desirable_qualifications: Good communication skills, enthusiasm to learn new tools & technologies, experience in relevant field

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must possess the minimum educational qualification with consistent academic record and relevant experience. Preference will be given to candidates with practical laboratory experience in electrical engineering.

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Remuneration
content_sections.text: Consolidated Salary: ₹21,000/- per month (Basic ₹18,000/- + Other Compensatory Allowance ₹3,000/-). Higher pay may be considered based on experience. Not entitled to Dearness Allowance (DA). Medical benefits and leave entitlements as per Institute norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must bring updated CV, original documents, experience certificates, and self-attested photocopies. Final selection is subject to performance in the interview and verification of documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Goa Lab Assistant Post
content_sections.text: No separate application form is required for registration. Report directly for the Walk-in Interview on 31-07-2026 at 09:30 AM. Bring all original educational & experience certificates along with a set of self-attested photocopies and updated CV. Venue: Indian Institute of Technology Goa, Admin Block, At Goa College of Engineering Campus, Farmagudi, Ponda-403401, Goa.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Goa Candidates
content_sections.text: The engagement is purely on contract basis and will not confer any right for regular appointment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to disengage the candidate at any time. Candidates are advised to visit the IIT Goa website for any updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for IIT Goa Lab Assistant Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: 31st July 2026 (Friday) at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Lab Assistant positions are available at IIT Goa?
faq.answer: 01 position in Electrical Engineering on contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Lab Assistant at IIT Goa?
faq.answer: ₹21,000/- per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification for IIT Goa Lab Assistant (Electrical Engineering)?
faq.answer: 3-year Diploma in Electrical Engineering with 1 year experience OR ITI with 3 years experience OR Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the IIT Goa Lab Assistant contract?
faq.answer: 6 months.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the Walk-in Interview for IIT Goa Lab Assistant be held?
faq.answer: Admin Block, Goa College of Engineering Campus, Farmagudi, Ponda, Goa.

faq.question: Q7. Is experience mandatory for IIT Goa Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, relevant experience is required depending on the qualification (1 year for Diploma, 3 years for ITI).

faq.question: Q8. Will higher pay be given in IIT Goa Lab Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, higher pay may be considered based on relevant experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is the IIT Goa Lab Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely on contract basis for 6 months.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I bring for IIT Goa Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Updated CV, original educational & experience certificates, and a set of self-attested photocopies.
